record.field: Get the chatter messages and activity log for a specific record. Returns the message history including comments, notes, status changes, and field tracking (who changed what and when). Requires the 'mail' module to be installed. Use this to understand the history of a record — e.g. who approved a purchase order, when was an invoice sent, what notes were left on a contact.

Post a message on a record's chatter (the discussion thread). This is used to leave comments, notes, or send notifications on any record that has the mail.thread mixin (most business records like sale.order, account.move, project.task, etc.). Use type 'comment' for messages visible to followers, or 'note' for internal notes only visible to internal users.
